title: xylocarpus moluccensis var. gangeticus
intro: Xylocarpus moluccensis var. gangeticus, also known as the Indian frugiger tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Rhizophoraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and prevent the growth of microorganisms. Xylocarpus moluccensis var. gangeticus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, and it is also used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce fever.
